concept: Steward / One Who Cares for the Deep Flow
description: One who practices stewardship, caring for land, resources, and communities as a sacred trust for the whole and for future generations.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'thelua' (stewardship) by adding the 'o' (wholeness) to signify the person who embodies this quality for the whole community. The word means 'one who embodies the deep, deliberate flow of care.'
